title: Present participle and adjective-like forms
subtitle: Recognize forms like intéressant and fatigant.
duolingoBridge: This helps reading and describing at high A2.
overview: Knowledge point 1: many -ant forms describe something causing an effect.
Knowledge point 2: do not confuse them with the gerund en + -ant.

items.fr: Ce livre est intéressant mais un peu difficile.
items.en: This book is interesting but a little difficult.
items.es: Este libro es interesante pero un poco difícil.

items.fr: Cette situation est stressante pour moi.
items.en: This situation is stressful for me.
items.es: Esta situación es estresante para mí.

items.fr: J’ai regardé un film très intéressant hier.
items.en: I watched a very interesting film yesterday.
items.es: Vi una película muy interesante ayer.
